Off Calendar Apr-19-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Lourdes Llanes, appearing on her own behalf. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by the Plaintiff, nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)
